description: baseline
value embeddings on every layer instead of alternating
replace plain FFN with parameter-matched SwiGLU MLP while keeping all-layer value embeddings
reduce short attention window from 256 to 128 so local layers are actually local
increase global attention frequency from SSSL to alternating SLSL with all-layer value embeddings
switch default attention layout from alternating SLSL windows to full global attention
halve attention head dim to 32 for 9-head full attention
switch default full attention to multi-query with 1 KV head and shared value embeddings
shift full-attention model to 7 layers with aspect ratio 40 to test a deeper-narrower balance at 320 width
broaden value-embedding gate from 32 channels to full hidden-state conditioning
widen full-attention all-value-embed model from 320 to 384 hidden size
reduce full-attention head count from 5 to 4 by widening head dim from 64 to 80 at 320 model width
switch exp012 full-attention model from 4 KV heads to grouped-query attention with 2 KV heads
tie input and output embeddings on exp013 full-attention 4-head GQA model
tighten exp013 full-attention 4-head GQA model to multi-query attention with 1 KV head
add learnable per-layer scaling on value embeddings in exp013 4-head GQA model
switch exp013 full-attention 4-head GQA model from ReluSquared MLPs to SiLU activations
reduce exp013 full-attention 4-head GQA model MLP expansion from 5x to 4x for a faster capacity tradeoff
replace exp013 plain FFN with parameter-matched SwiGLU MLP
reduce exp013 full-attention 320-wide 4-head GQA model from 6 layers to 5 to trade depth for faster optimization
switch transformer blocks to parallel residual attn+mlp branches
deepen full-attention GQA model to 8 layers while narrowing to 256 width with 64-d heads
deepen exp022 full-attention 256-wide 4-head GQA model to 9 layers while holding width fixed
deepen exp023 full-attention 256-wide 4-head GQA model to 10 layers while holding width fixed
increase exp023 full-attention 256-wide 9-layer model from 4/2 heads to 8/4 heads by using 32-d head size
switch exp023 full-attention 256-wide 9-layer model from 4-query/2-kv GQA to 4-query/1-kv multi-query attention
ablate value embeddings from exp026 9-layer 256-wide full-attention MQA model
deepen exp027 256-wide full-attention MQA no-value-embed model from 9 to 10 layers
increase exp027 9-layer 256-wide full-attention MQA no-value-embed model MLP expansion from 5x to 6x
increase exp027 9-layer 256-wide full-attention MQA no-value-embed model from 4 heads to 8 heads by using 32-d head size
increase exp027 9-layer 256-wide no-value-embed full-attention model from 1 to 2 KV heads to test light GQA
widen exp027 9-layer 256-wide full-attention MQA no-value-embed model to 288 hidden size with 4 heads
ablate learned per-layer x0 skip from embeddings in exp027 9-layer 256-wide full-attention MQA model
